example: Watching a kitten fumbling around, it might feel as if you've never encountered anything so devastatingly adorable.
ja: 手探りでやる、もたもたする

example: You might feel as if you've never encountered anything so devastatingly adorable.
ja: 壊滅的に、とても強烈に

example: You may also feel the conflicting urge to squeeze or smush the kitten.
You might be appalled by yourself for feeling that urge.
ja: 愕然とした、ぞっとした

example: Psychologists call this urge cute aggression, a surprisingly common one.
zh: 可愛攻擊症，對可愛事物產生的攻擊性衝動
ja: かわいさ攻撃性（かわいさに対する攻撃的衝動）

example: To better understand this peculiar phenomenon, let's start with what cuteness is.
One scientist created a baby schema that identified key features associated with cuteness.
zh: 嬰兒圖式，描述嬰兒特徵的理論模型
ja: ベビー・スキーマ（赤ちゃんの特徴を示す理論モデル）

example: Baby schema includes features like plump cheeks and large eyes.
The photos appear to stimulate brain regions associated with emotion and reward.
Participants performed better at the game operation, which demands precise movements.
The fact that cuteness hijacks our emotions is certainly not lost on advertisers.
One theory is that cute things simply make us want to nurture them.
Human babies are relatively helpless on their own.
ja: 無力な、助けを必要とする

example: As we domesticated animals, their appearances tended to change.
Certain animals became more docile as they adopted juvenile features.
Physical changes are regulated by an embryonic structure called the neural crest.
The neural crest helps determine how some embryo cells differentiate.
Under-development of the pituitary gland can affect fear and aggression.
The adrenal glands govern fear and aggression.
Physical traits like floppy ears and smaller jaws are linked to domestication.
Selecting for behavioral characteristics like friendliness may select for cuter traits.
Ancient humans formed larger, more cooperative groups.
Humans have subtler brow ridges compared to evolutionary cousins.
Cute aggression seems to result from emotional overload.
Cute things elicit such positive emotions that the experience becomes overwhelming.
Slightly aggressive, discordant thoughts regulate intense feelings.
Cuteness can come off as a frivolous, innocent quality.
Cuteness wields immense, consequential power.
Learn about the strange disease of toxoplasmosis.
zh: 弓形蟲病（一種寄生蟲感染）
